description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat, slightly sloped shed roof featuring a rooftop water tank and a solar panel. The exterior walls are finished in a light, neutral color, and the structure sits on a rectangular green lawn base. The front facade includes a double glass door and a large window, both framed in wood, and is complemented by a spacious wooden porch extending to one side. The rear and side elevations show additional windows, providing ample natural light, and the roof overhangs create shaded areas around the building. The overall design is minimalist, with clean lines and a functional layout typical of contemporary urban residential architecture.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a sloped shed roof, large windows, and a wooden porch on a green lawn base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double glass door, large window, and wooden porch extending to the left.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the sloped roof, rooftop water tank, and the side wall with minimal openings.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying two windows and the continuation of the wooden deck at the back.
description_view_3: Right side view showing a single window, the wooden deck, and the overhanging roof.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front and side windows
